## Custom Anchor Heading {#my-custom-anchor}

<a id="html-a-id-anchor"></a>

<div id="html-div-id-anchor">Some content</div>

<!-- KNOWN LIMITATION: <a name="..."> is NOT detected as an anchor target.
     Also: <a name="..."> with inner text crashes the parser when the href is empty
     and there is no id= attribute either. So this is excluded from the fixture. -->
